ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The list property to store file name history.
ast.target: 用于存储文件名历史记录的列表属性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Time in seconds the name must be stable before adding to the configured property.
ast.target: 名称必须稳定多少秒后才能添加到配置的属性中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, treat case differences as unique values in the configured property.
ast.target: 如果启用，将大小写差异视为配置属性中的唯一值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically create the configured property if missing.
ast.target: 如果缺失，自动创建配置的属性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of file extensions to track.
ast.target: 要跟踪的文件扩展名的逗号分隔列表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated regex patterns for file names or immediate parent folder names to ignore (e.g., ^_ for underscore prefixes, ^untitled$ for untitled). Leave empty to disable.
ast.target: 用于忽略文件名或直接父文件夹名的逗号分隔正则表达式模式（例如，^_ 表示下划线前缀，^untitled$ 表示无标题）。留空则禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name of a boolean property to check in files. Files with this property set to true will be excluded from tracking. Takes priority over folder filtering.
ast.target: 要在文件中检查的布尔属性名称。将此属性设置为 true 的文件将被排除在跟踪之外。优先于文件夹过滤。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of folder paths to include. If empty, all folders are included. Use {vault} or {root} to include only files directly in the vault root (no subfolders).
ast.target: 要包含的文件夹路径的逗号分隔列表。如果为空，则包含所有文件夹。使用 {vault} 或 {root} 仅包含保险库根目录中的文件（无子文件夹）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of folder paths to exclude. Supports wildcards: use "folder/*" to exclude direct children, "folder/**" to exclude all descendants. Use {vault} or {root} to exclude files directly in the vault root.
ast.target: 要排除的文件夹路径的逗号分隔列表。支持通配符：使用 \"folder/*\" 排除直接子项，\"folder/**\" 排除所有后代。使用 {vault} 或 {root} 排除保险库根目录中的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If a Markdown file matches this file name, store old immediate parent folder names in the configured property when parent folders are renamed.
ast.target: 如果 Markdown 文件与此文件名匹配，则在父文件夹重命名时，将旧的直接父文件夹名称存储在配置的属性中。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自动创建历史记录属性

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Track folder renames for specific file name
ast.target: 跟踪特定文件名的文件夹重命名
